source_jobs.description:
<div class="content-intro"><p><span style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Arionkoder is an AI consulting firm helping companies build, embed, and own AI systems that drive real business outcomes. We combine Product Development, Artificial Intelligence, and Team Augmentation to craft digital products and solutions that create lasting impact — guided by a human-centric approach and a commitment to pushing the boundaries of what technology can do.</span></p></div><p style="line-height: 1.5;"><span style="font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><strong>What you’ll do</strong></span><br><span style="font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;">The Senior Software Engineer (Elixir) reports to the Engineering Manager and works closely with cross-functional teams including other software engineers, architects, quality assurance, and product managers to ensure seamless, high-quality product and platform delivery. In this role, you will design, develop, test, deploy, and maintain world-class applications written in Elixir. You will also optimize these applications for speed, reliability, and scalability.</span></p>
<p style="line-height: 1.5;"><br><span style="font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><strong>Your Impact</strong></span><br><span style="font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;">● Design, develop, deploy, and maintain high-performance, robust, and scalable APIs using Elixir. Also, conduct performance optimization to improve system responsiveness and throughput.</span><br><span style="font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;">● Ensure API security protocols are in place to protect data and systems.</span><br><span style="font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;">● Collaborate with cross-functional teams, both internal and external, to define, design, and bring innovative features to life.</span><br><span style="font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;">● Identify and resolve issues and performance bottlenecks with existing API and integration architectures.</span><br><span style="font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;">● Create and maintain technical documentation for API usage and system integrations.</span><br><span style="font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;">● Uphold and propagate best practices in server-side Elixir-based application design, and collaborate with architects and engineers to continuously improve upon these best practices.</span><br><span style="font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;">● Engage in architectural discussions and actively contribute to the technical decision-making process.</span><br><span style="font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;">● Mentor other developers to foster a culture of innovation, quality, and growth.</span><br><span style="font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;">● Continuously research, evaluate, test, and implement new technologies to optimize application performance and development efficiency.</span><br><span style="font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;">● Collaborate with external stakeholders to design efficient integrations.</span><br><span style="font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-
